title: Breaking community defends b-girl Raygun and is hopeful for return to Olympic program | MPR News
description: In a show of support on Sunday, the head judge of the breaking competition said 36-year-old university professor Rachael Gunn was just trying to be original. And the breaking federation says it has offered mental health support in the wake of online criticism.
